title: reseda valentina subsp. valentina
intro: Reseda valentina subsp. valentina, also known as valerian grass or Spanish valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Resedaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving anxiety and insomnia, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Reseda valentina subsp. valentina include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
